data.wrapped_entity: Cover to wrap (must support open, close, and stop commands at least else it won't be listed here)

data.name: Name
data.treat_min_as_closed: Report as closed at minimum position
data.skip_stop_at_limits: Rely on the cover's own endstop at full open/close

data_description.min_value: The wrapped cover will never be commanded below this position.
data_description.max_value: The wrapped cover will never be commanded above this position.
data_description.enforce_bounds: If the wrapped cover's current position is outside the bounds when they change, immediately re-command it back within bounds.
data_description.treat_min_as_closed: Report this cover as closed whenever its position is at or below the configured minimum, instead of only at 0%.
data_description.hide_wrapped_entity: Hide the wrapped cover entity in the Home Assistant UI. It remains fully available to automations and scripts.
data_description.open_duration: Only shown when the wrapped cover doesn't support precise positioning: time in seconds for it to travel from fully closed (0%) to fully open (100%). This Advanced Cover simulates its position from elapsed travel time in that case.
data_description.close_duration: Time in seconds for the wrapped cover to travel from fully open (100%) to fully closed (0%).
data_description.skip_stop_at_limits: If a simulated move finishes at 0% or 100%, don't send an explicit stop command - assume the wrapped cover's hardware limit switch already stopped it. A move that finishes at any other bound always sends the stop command.

data.skip_stop_at_tilt_limits: Rely on the cover's own tilt endstop at full open/close

data_description.min_tilt_value: The wrapped cover's tilt will never be commanded below this position.
data_description.max_tilt_value: The wrapped cover's tilt will never be commanded above this position.
data_description.enforce_tilt_bounds: If the wrapped cover's current tilt position is outside the bounds when they change, immediately re-command it back within bounds.
data_description.open_tilt_duration: Only shown when the wrapped cover doesn't support precise tilt positioning: time in seconds for its tilt to travel from fully closed (0%) to fully open (100%). This Advanced Cover simulates its tilt position from elapsed travel time in that case.
data_description.close_tilt_duration: Time in seconds for the wrapped cover's tilt to travel from fully open (100%) to fully closed (0%).
data_description.skip_stop_at_tilt_limits: If a simulated tilt move finishes at 0% or 100%, don't send an explicit stop command - assume the wrapped cover's hardware limit switch already stopped it. A move that finishes at any other bound always sends the stop command.

error.min_greater_than_max: Minimum position must not be greater than maximum position.
error.min_tilt_greater_than_max_tilt: Minimum tilt position must not be greater than maximum tilt position.

abort.already_configured: This cover is already wrapped by an Advanced Cover.

data.treat_min_as_closed: Report as closed at minimum position
data.skip_stop_at_limits: Rely on the cover's own endstop at full open/close

data_description.enforce_bounds: If the wrapped cover's current position is outside the bounds when they change, immediately re-command it back within bounds.
data_description.treat_min_as_closed: Report this cover as closed whenever its position is at or below the configured minimum, instead of only at 0%.
data_description.hide_wrapped_entity: Hide the wrapped cover entity in the Home Assistant UI. It remains fully available to automations and scripts.
data_description.open_duration: Only shown when the wrapped cover doesn't support precise positioning: time in seconds for it to travel from fully closed (0%) to fully open (100%). This Advanced Cover simulates its position from elapsed travel time in that case.

data.skip_stop_at_tilt_limits: Rely on the cover's own tilt endstop at full open/close

data_description.min_tilt_value: The wrapped cover's tilt will never be commanded below this position.
data_description.max_tilt_value: The wrapped cover's tilt will never be commanded above this position.
data_description.enforce_tilt_bounds: If the wrapped cover's current tilt position is outside the bounds when they change, immediately re-command it back within bounds.
data_description.open_tilt_duration: Only shown when the wrapped cover doesn't support precise tilt positioning: time in seconds for its tilt to travel from fully closed (0%) to fully open (100%). This Advanced Cover simulates its tilt position from elapsed travel time in that case.

error.min_greater_than_max: Minimum position must not be greater than maximum position.
error.min_tilt_greater_than_max_tilt: Minimum tilt position must not be greater than maximum tilt position.

set_min_position.name: Set minimum position
set_min_position.description: Update an Advanced Cover's minimum position bound at runtime, without reconfiguring the integration.

enforce.name: Enforce
enforce.description: Override the entity's configured proactive-enforcement setting for this call only. Leave unset to use the entity's default, set to true to force an immediate re-clamp, or false to skip it.

set_max_position.name: Set maximum position
set_max_position.description: Update an Advanced Cover's maximum position bound at runtime, without reconfiguring the integration.

enforce.name: Enforce
enforce.description: Override the entity's configured proactive-enforcement setting for this call only. Leave unset to use the entity's default, set to true to force an immediate re-clamp, or false to skip it.

set_enforce_bounds.name: Set enforce bounds
set_enforce_bounds.description: Update an Advanced Cover's proactive-enforcement setting at runtime, without reconfiguring the integration.

enforce.name: Enforce
enforce.description: Whether the wrapped cover should be proactively re-clamped whenever it ends up outside the configured bounds.

set_min_tilt_position.name: Set minimum tilt position
set_min_tilt_position.description: Update an Advanced Cover's minimum tilt position bound at runtime, without reconfiguring the integration.

enforce.name: Enforce
enforce.description: Override the entity's configured proactive tilt-enforcement setting for this call only. Leave unset to use the entity's default, set to true to force an immediate re-clamp, or false to skip it.

set_max_tilt_position.name: Set maximum tilt position
set_max_tilt_position.description: Update an Advanced Cover's maximum tilt position bound at runtime, without reconfiguring the integration.

enforce.name: Enforce
enforce.description: Override the entity's configured proactive tilt-enforcement setting for this call only. Leave unset to use the entity's default, set to true to force an immediate re-clamp, or false to skip it.

set_enforce_tilt_bounds.name: Set enforce tilt bounds
set_enforce_tilt_bounds.description: Update an Advanced Cover's proactive tilt-enforcement setting at runtime, without reconfiguring the integration.

enforce.name: Enforce
enforce.description: Whether the wrapped cover's tilt should be proactively re-clamped whenever it ends up outside the configured tilt bounds.
